outline.title: Craft Day!
outline.summary: Welcome slide for Day 4 Craft Day. Excited animals and craft supplies. Title: Today is Craft Day! We're making our own pets!
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Let's Sing!
outline.summary: Old MacDonald Had a Farm song slide. Musical notes, farm animals, microphone icon.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Phonics Review: Short U
outline.summary: Review game for SG2 U7-8 word families (-ub, -ug, -up, -ud, -un, -ut). Show pictures, students guess the word.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Phonics Review: Long A
outline.summary: Review game for SG3 U1-2 word families (-ake, -ape, -ave, -ame, -ane, -ate). Show pictures, students guess the word.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Phonics Review: Long I
outline.summary: Review game for SG3 U3-4 word families (-ike, -ime, -ine, -ite, -ide, -ipe, -ire, -ive). Show pictures, students guess the word.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: My Pet Craft!
outline.summary: Craft instructions: Choose an animal, draw it, color it, cut it out, make a stick puppet. Step-by-step visual guide.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Show and Tell Time!
outline.summary: Pet Show stage with spotlights. Target sentences: My pet is a ___. It is ___. It can ___. Then act like the animal!
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Act Like Your Pet!
outline.summary: Movement activity - students act like their animal. Other students guess. Fun action poses of different animals.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Worksheet Time!
outline.summary: Draw your pet in your handbook and write the sentences about it.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Great Job! See You Next Time!
outline.summary: Celebration slide with all the animals from the week. Get your Passport stamped! Goodbye!
